identity.name: Widow Hood
identity.story: Survived the wolf business with her dignity intact. Bakes for the whole lane and inspects every visitor's teeth.

relationships.kind: they compare notes on wolves, annually
still checks his teeth every high sun, the one visitor she's never had to ask twice
the expected company she bakes for every first light, basket delivered, no reason left to hurry either of them
the other one who used to get visitors the hard way; they've agreed the easy way suits them both better now

behavior.label: Widow Hood's tally, chalked below Pip's mark

child.label: the annual tally, kept face to face this year

children.label: stepping out to the gate to wait for him now, instead of chalking his count alone
checking his teeth herself, up close, the one visitor she's never had to ask twice
chalking this year's tally onto the boundary stone, his count entered in person, right below the mark Pip already left

child.label: locking up before the light goes
